x-artifact.note: Design-first artifact only — describes the MCP tool surface, not a running server. Tool input/output schemas $ref the same object schemas as the OpenAPI; each tool maps to an OpenAPI operationId. DCP is the city's reference-geography source; this surface is read-only (the geography spine), with a canonical geocoder as the net-new value. No citizen write workflow exists.

server.name: io.nyc.dcp
server.title: NYC City Planning (DCP)
server.description: Agent-native access to the New York City Department of City Planning — tax lots (PLUTO), zoning, community districts, Neighborhood Tabulation Areas, census tracts, and land-use applications. DCP is the authoritative source of the citywide geography spine (BBL, community districts, NTAs, council/census geographies) every other agency references; this server anchors that spine and adds a canonical address->BBL geocoder.
server.instructions: Use geocode_address to turn an address into a BBL, BIN, coordinates, and the full geography spine (community district, council district, census tract, NTA) — the entry point for almost every question. lookup_lot fetches the authoritative PLUTO record for a BBL; find_lots searches lots by borough/zoning/geography. find_zoning / get_zoning explain zoning district codes. get_community_district, find_ntas / get_nta, and get_census_tract resolve the shared geographies. find_land_use_applications covers ULURP/land-use review (reference data on an agency pipeline, not a citizen action). This server is read-only — DCP is a reference agency with no transactional write workflow.

tools.name: geocode_address
tools.title: Geocode Address
tools.description: Resolve an address to a BBL, BIN, coordinates, and the full geography spine (community district, council district, census tract, NTA, precinct, school district). The net-new canonical geocoder fronting DCP GeoClient.

tools.name: lookup_lot
tools.title: Look Up Tax Lot
tools.description: Fetch the authoritative PLUTO record for a Borough-Block-Lot (BBL) — land use, owner, zoning, FAR, and the geography spine.

tools.name: find_lots
tools.title: Find Tax Lots
tools.description: Search PLUTO tax lots by borough, block, community/council district, zoning district, land use, or free text.

tools.name: find_zoning
tools.title: Find Zoning Districts
tools.description: List zoning districts, overlays, and special districts, optionally filtered by category or free text.

tools.name: get_zoning
tools.title: Get Zoning District
tools.description: Explain a zoning district code (e.g. 'R6', 'C1-2', 'M1-1') — what it permits and its FAR limits.

tools.name: get_community_district
tools.title: Get Community District
tools.description: Fetch a community district by borough+district code (e.g. 101 = Manhattan CD 1), with population history.

tools.name: find_ntas
tools.title: Find Neighborhood Tabulation Areas
tools.description: List 2020 NTAs, optionally by borough or free text.

tools.name: get_nta
tools.title: Get NTA
tools.description: Fetch a Neighborhood Tabulation Area by code (e.g. 'MN0101').

tools.name: get_census_tract
tools.title: Get Census Tract
tools.description: Fetch a 2020 census tract by GEOID, with its parent NTA and CDTA.

tools.name: find_land_use_applications
tools.title: Find Land-Use Applications
tools.description: Search ULURP / land-use applications by borough, community district, status, action type, or affected BBL. Reference data on an agency review pipeline — not a citizen write workflow.
